product_overview: Sitesync is a web-based construction site management platform that centralizes daily operations, inventory tracking, payroll configuration, and financial reporting with an on-screen AI assistant for contextual insights.
core_goals: Allow site supervisors and staff to record and review daily attendance and close shifts.
Enable storekeepers to track material stock levels, update quantities, and add new materials to the catalog.
Let finance users create invoices, run transaction reports over date ranges, and export reports/receipts to PDF.
Provide an in-app AI assistant that answers questions about site data (inventory, attendance, finance) to aid decision-making.
Offer a single authenticated dashboard that surfaces operations, inventory, and finance summaries and basic administrative controls.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Sign in to access the platform and sign out to end the session. Session state controls access to all protected routes.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email and password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard at /
Navigate to /login -> Submit login form with empty email or password -> See validation error for required fields
Navigate to / -> Open profile drawer -> Sign out -> See /login

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Authenticated landing page that summarizes key site metrics across operations, inventory, and finance.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See overview metrics for operations, inventory, and finance
Navigate to / -> Open floating assistant -> Ask for a high-level site summary -> Receive a concise data-driven insight

features.name: Workforce Operations
features.description: Manage daily attendance records, perform end-of-shift processing, and configure payroll components like base salary, PF, and medical funds.
user_flows: Navigate to /ops -> Toggle to Attendance tab -> View attendance logs -> Sort attendance by Present
Navigate to /ops -> Toggle to Attendance tab -> Trigger End Shift to close daily operations -> Confirm end shift -> See shift closed status
Navigate to /ops -> Toggle to Payroll tab -> Open salary configuration -> Enter base salary, PF, and medical values -> Save payroll configuration -> See payroll reflected in payroll list
Navigate to /ops -> Toggle to Payroll tab -> Open salary configuration -> Leave base salary empty -> Attempt to save -> See validation error about required base salary

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: View material categories and stock levels, update quantities for existing materials, and add new materials to the catalog.
user_flows: Navigate to /inventory -> View stock levels and categories -> Select a material to update -> Enter updated quantity -> Save changes -> See updated stock level
Navigate to /inventory -> Open new material form -> Enter material name and unit -> Save new material -> See new material listed in the catalog
Navigate to /inventory -> Open new material form -> Enter material name but omit unit -> Attempt to save -> See validation error about missing unit

features.name: Financial Reporting & Invoicing
features.description: Create multi-line invoices, generate transaction reports filtered by date range, and export reports or receipts to PDF for records.
user_flows: Navigate to /finance -> Open new invoice form -> Add first line item -> Add additional line items as needed -> Enter invoice metadata (recipient and date) -> Save invoice -> See invoice listed
Navigate to /finance -> Apply date range filter to transactions -> Generate transaction report -> Export report to PDF -> Download PDF

features.name: AI Assistant
features.description: A floating assistant that provides context-aware insights into inventory, attendance, and finance to help users interpret site data.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open floating assistant -> Ask a question about inventory or attendance -> Receive a data-driven insight in the assistant window

features.name: Admin Settings
features.description: Access administrative sections for user and site configuration. Some admin actions are UI-only placeholders in the current implementation.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> View administrative sections for user management and site configuration -> Trigger Manage Staff action -> See placeholder indicating UI-only action
Navigate to /admin -> Trigger Site Configuration action -> See placeholder indicating UI-only action

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and session management using Supabase
user_interactions: Open profile drawer and click Sign Out

features.name: Workforce Operations
features.description: Daily attendance, shift closing, and payroll configuration
user_interactions: Toggle between Attendance, Payroll, and Payments tabs
Click End Shift to close daily operations
View and sort attendance logs (Present, Absent, On Leave)
Configure and view detailed payroll distribution (PF, Medical)

features.name: Inventory Management
user_interactions: Add new materials to the catalog

features.name: Financial Reporting
features.description: Invoice generation and transaction audit reports
user_interactions: Create new invoices with multiple line items
Generate full transaction reports with date range filtering
Export reports and receipts to PDF

features.name: AI Assistant
user_interactions: Ask questions about inventory or attendance

known_limitations.impact: Manage Staff and Site Configuration buttons are placeholders
Data is not persisted to Supabase database yet
